title: Berliner Dom Tickets - Quick Summary
items: **Check the official calendar before buying.** Berliner Dom is an active church, so services, concerts and special events can change visitor access.

**Current official visitor prices are clear.** As checked on 5 July 2026: standard ticket 15 euros, concession 12 euros, Berlin WelcomeCard 11 euros, and a ticket with children is 15 euros for 1 adult with up to 4 children under 18.
**The ticket is strongest when you want more than a photo.** The nave, dome walkway, Hohenzollern Crypt and Museum Island setting each need real attention.
**Do the dome climb only when your time and knees fit.** VisitBerlin describes the route as 270 steps to the outer walkway; skip it if the day is already heavy.
**The Hohenzollern Crypt reopened on 1 March 2026.** That makes older visitor advice easy to misread, so check current official information.
